narrative:
90 Ohio House district has 69,008 registered voters, with 56.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -11.6% D−R vs -16.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
